title: Bundle of 2 x Renata 337 Watch Battery 1.55v SR416SW + Quzo Belgian Chocolate - Official Renata Watch Batteries
description: Battery Safety and Specifications - Battery safety is paramount, especially when dealing with small components like watch batteries. It's crucial to keep them out of reach of children due to potential hazards if mishandled. Storing spare batteries securely and disposing of used ones immediately and safely are essential practices. Additionally, if there's any suspicion that a battery has been swallowed or inserted into the body, seeking immediate medical attention is imperative to avoid potential health risks.
